name: Critical Security Fixes
description: Remove security vulnerabilities, hardcoded credentials, exposed API keys, and insecure utility routes. This phase must be completed before any other work.
objectives: Remove all hardcoded API keys and credentials
Eliminate admin setup and password reset utilities
Fix memory leaks in authentication flow
Add Firebase Security Rules documentation requirements

tasks.title: Remove Temporary Admin Utilities

actions.reason: Security vulnerability - allows unauthorized admin account creation
Security vulnerability - allows unauthorized password resets

changes.description: Remove useEffect that checks URL parameters for admin setup/reset
Remove conditional renders for admin setup and password reset pages

validation: Verify AdminSetup.tsx is deleted
Verify AdminPasswordReset.tsx is deleted
Verify no references to these components in App.tsx
Test that ?setup=admin and ?reset=admin URL params do nothing
Ensure application still runs without errors
tasks.notes: These utilities must be permanently removed. Do not move them to another location or comment them out.

tasks.title: Remove Hardcoded Admin Email Check

changes.reason: Hardcoded credentials are a security vulnerability

changes.description: Update role assignment to only use Firestore data
changes.newLogic: If userDoc.exists(), assign role from userData. Otherwise, log error and sign out user. No hardcoded fallbacks.

validation: Verify admin email check iserased
Verify only Firestore role assignment remains
Test that user without Firestore document gets logged out
Ensure no console.warn about legacy fallback

tasks.title: Implement Environment Variables for Firebase Config

actions.content:
# Firebase Configuration
VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY=your_api_key_here
VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=your_project.firebaseapp.com
VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=your_project_id
VITE_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=your_project.appspot.com
VITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=your_sender_id
VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID=your_app_id

# Google AI (for backend use only - do not expose in frontend)
# GOOGLE_GENAI_API_KEY=your_api_key_here

validation: Verify .env.example exists with all required variables
Verify firebase.ts uses import.meta.env instead of hardcoded values
Verify .env.local is in .gitignore
Test that application fails gracefully if env vars are missing
Ensure .env.local is created with actual values (not committed)
tasks.notes: User must manually create .env.local file with actual Firebase credentials. Do not commit this file.

tasks.title: Fix Memory Leak in Email Verification Page

changes.reason: Prevents memory leak and removes full page reload

validation: Verify no window.location.reload() in the code
Verify isMounted flag prevents state updates after unmount
Verify error handling is present
Test that navigation works when email is verified
Check for memory leaks in React DevTools

tasks.title: Add Image Upload Validation
validation: Test uploading invalid file type (e.g., .pdf) - should show error
Test uploading large file (>5MB) - should show error
Test uploading valid image - should succeed
Verify error messages are in Hebrew
Verify file input is reset on validation failure

tasks.title: Move Google GenAI to Backend (Documentation Only)

actions.description: Temporarily disable AI distance calculation until backend is implemented

changes.reason: Cannot safely use GenAI API in frontend

actions.content:
# Backend Implementation Required

## Google GenAI Distance Calculation

**Priority**: HIGH
**Status**: Frontend implementation removed due to security concerns

### Requirements
1. Create Firebase Cloud Function: `calculateJobDistance`
2. Function should accept: userLocation, jobLocation
3. Function should use Google GenAI securely on backend
4. Return: distance text and Google Maps link

### Implementation Notes
- API key stored in Cloud Functions environment
- Rate limiting implemented
- Caching for repeated requests
- Fallback to Haversine calculation if AI fails

### Current Workaround
Using basic Haversine formula for straight-line distance.

validation: Verify no API keys in frontend code
Verify fallback distance calculation works
Verify TODO documentation exists
Test that job detail page still displays distance
tasks.notes: This is a temporary solution. Proper backend implementation required.

postConditions: No hardcoded credentials exist in codebase
No memory leaks in authentication flow
AI API keys are not exposed
rollbackProcedure: If deployment fails, revert to previous commit. Ensure .env.local file is backed up before making changes.
documentation: Update README.md with environment variable setup instructions
Document removed features (admin utilities) in CHANGELOG.md
Add security best practices to CONTRIBUTING.md
